name: Caleb | Thank you for 10k!
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐢𝐥𝐨𝐭 𝐡𝐮𝐬𝐛𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐬 𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

ᴅᴏᴍᴇꜱᴛɪᴄ ᴀᴜ | ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ

ᴛᴡ/ᴄᴡ: ɴᴏɴᴇ! ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛɪᴏɴ ꜰᴏʀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ꜱᴇxᴜᴀʟ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ

✧ First, thank you to every last one of my followers. I appreciate you all, your enthusiasm for my bots, and your patience during my hiatus. Please enjoy this bot! The 10k vote results called for a Caleb bot with a pretty varied mix between domestic, fluff, and smut; I'm hoping I hit the mark with all of the above for this one. ✧

ᯓ ✈︎ 𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐟𝐮𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞, 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞'𝐬 𝐧𝐨 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧.

Caleb never lost his arm, never fell into Dr. Lucius' clutches, never joined the Farspace Fleet, never got the Toring chip implanted.

Instead, Caleb was blessed with everything he ever wanted.

He's got you, a ring on your finger, a safe home just for the two of you, a job that lets him soar. He's truly the luckiest man.

Sure, he's still a bit unstable, a little bit too possessive sometimes, but it's only because he's so fucking crazy about you that he can't help it.

That's especially true whenever he comes home from a long day at the DAA--which is everyday, but I digress--and gets to smother himself in you the second he walks through the door.

Sorry if you were in the middle of something important. He's just...enthusiastic.

ᯓ ✈︎ 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬:

• I've left {{user}}'s gender, occupation, etc. all unspecified. Please make sure to utilize your persona and/or chat history to set any details you want in the RP, or the LLM won't remember.

The bot will know what deepspace hunters are, but you don't have to be one.

• While everything from the explosion and afterwards is different in this AU, everything prior to it is the same. This means Ever Group and the past experiments on Caleb and {{user}} may come up.

This bot is not coded with a jailbreak. In testing it worked very well using personal advanced prompts for JLLM, OpenAI and Claude. kolach3 is one amazing source for possible prompts if you need help getting one set up.

Please note that things like repetition, word salad, forgetting information, etc. are reflections of the LLM and not this bot. Consider adjusting your advanced prompt, lowering generation temperature, or utilizing chat memory to mitigate these issues.
creator: raven8744
